chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.1429 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.8753/2022. 2. For orders on MA No.8754/2022. 3. For hearing of bail application. 21.7.2022 Ms.Tuba Asghar, Advocate for applicant a/w applicant. ************* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Applicant Muhammad Usman has filed this application for protective bail on the ground that he has been falsely implicated in FIR No.398/2021 under Section 364-A/34, PPC, registered at PS Tipu Sultan, and he is apprehensive of his arrest and humiliation at the hands of police, who is acting mala fide and he intends to approach the trial Court, hence needs protection. Without touching merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective/transitory bail in above FIR for a period of 07 days from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/= and PR Bond in the same amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court enabling him to appear before the trial Court. This order shall cease to exist on expiry of seven days from today or on surrender of the applicant before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. However, in case of failure of the applicant to do so within stipulated period the surety furnished by him shall stand forfeited. The Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
